skill.name: maxhub-toutiao
skill.description: 头条/Toutiao平台今日头条新闻资讯搜索与数据采集。当用户提到头条、toutiao、新闻、资讯、推荐等相关需求时激活此Skill。
skill.summary: 头条/Toutiao新闻资讯搜索与数据采集Skill，支持文章、视频、用户信息查询及评论获取
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 70 static findings are false positives. The detected patterns (external_commands, env_access, hardcoded URLs) are markdown documentation with curl command examples and environment variable references. The skill is legitimate news data collection for the Toutiao platform with proper security declarations, rate limits (60 calls/minute, max 5 pages), and cost controls. No malicious behavior confirmed.

content.user_title: Search Toutiao News and Content Data
content.value_statement: Search and collect news articles, videos, and user data from Toutiao platform. Integrates with Claude Code via MaxHub API proxy for automated content analysis and data aggregation.
actual_capabilities: Fetch article information by ID from Toutiao web and app platforms
Retrieve video metadata including views, likes, and engagement metrics
Get user profile data including follower count and content count
Obtain user comments on specific posts with pagination support
Convert user profile URLs to internal user IDs
Chain multiple API calls for comprehensive data analysis
limitations: Requires valid MaxHub API key with sufficient balance
Rate limited to 60 calls per minute by default
Cannot modify or interact with content (read-only access)
Some API endpoints require specific platform IDs (aweme_id, group_id)

use_cases.title: Content Creator Analytics
use_cases.description: Analyze Toutiao creator performance by fetching user data and content metrics to understand audience engagement patterns.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: News Aggregation Tool
use_cases.description: Collect and aggregate news articles on specific topics from Toutiao for competitive analysis or research purposes.

use_cases.title: Trending Topic Monitor
use_cases.description: Track trending topics and viral content on Toutiao by monitoring video and article performance metrics.

prompt_templates.title: Find articles about a topic
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for recent articles about [topic] on Toutiao and summarize the key findings.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to research content on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Analyze a content creator
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the profile and recent content for the Toutiao user at [profile_url] and analyze their engagement strategy.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to analyze a specific creator

prompt_templates.title: Get video performance data
prompt_templates.prompt: Fetch the detailed metrics for this Toutiao video [video_id] including views, likes, and comment count.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants specific video analytics

prompt_templates.title: Monitor comment sentiment
prompt_templates.prompt: Collect the first 20 comments on the article [article_id] and summarize the overall sentiment.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to analyze audience reactions

output_examples.input: Search for recent articles about AI technology on Toutiao
output_examples.output: Found 10 AI-related articles. Top article: 'AI驱动的新闻推荐算法解析' with 15,000 views and 890 interactions. Other articles cover topics including machine learning applications, automation tools, and industry news.

output_examples.input: Get profile data for content creator example_profile
output_examples.output: Creator profile retrieved: Username: 科技达人, Followers: 125,000, Total posts: 456. Average engagement rate: 4.2%. Most active category: Technology reviews.

output_examples.input: What are the metrics for video abc123?
output_examples.output: Video metrics: Views: 89,000, Likes: 5,200, Comments: 342, Shares: 890. Published 3 days ago. Currently trending in Technology category.

best_practices: Always check API balance before bulk data collection to avoid service interruption
Use pagination (max 5 pages per request) to prevent excessive API calls and costs
Store API key securely in environment variables, never hardcode in scripts
anti_patterns: Do not make automated requests without rate limiting - respect the 60 calls/minute limit
Do not collect personal privacy data or attempt to identify individual users
Do not use collected data for platform manipulation or automated engagement

faq.question: What data can I collect with this skill?
faq.answer: You can fetch article information, video metadata, user profiles, and comments from Toutiao. All data is publicly available and read-only.

faq.question: How much does using this skill cost?
faq.answer: API calls are billed per request by MaxHub. Check the MaxHub console for current pricing. The skill warns you when making many consecutive calls.

faq.question: Can I use this to scrape Toutiao directly?
faq.answer: No. This skill uses the MaxHub API proxy which handles compliance with platform terms of service. Direct scraping violates Toutiao's policies.

faq.question: What rate limits apply?
faq.answer: Default limit is 60 calls per minute. The skill enforces pagination limits (max 5 pages) and prompts for confirmation on large operations.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to use with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill only makes HTTPS API calls to the MaxHub service. It does not access local files, execute system commands, or store sensitive data.

faq.question: How do I get started?
faq.answer: Register at aconfig.cn, create an API key, set the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable, and you can begin using the skill immediately.
